title: senecio canchahuinganquensis
intro: Senecio canchahuinganquensis, also known as Cancha Huininga, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family native to Peru. It has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Senecio canchahuinganquensis include reducing inflammation, fighting against bacterial infections, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable plant for traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Senecio canchahuinganquensis typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves, which can be consumed as a tea or applied topically to the affected area.
